message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 1
skinparam lifelineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam lifelineBorderColor #000000

actor "Webブラウザ" as WebBrowser
participant "CCM GUI\n(Web)" as CCMGUIWeb
participant "CCM GUI\n(WebSocket)" as CCMGUIWebSocket
participant "CCM SDK\n(IPC)" as CCMSDK

WebBrowser -> CCMGUIWeb: 
CCMGUIWeb -> CCMGUIWebSocket: 
CCMGUIWebSocket -> CCMSDK: 

note right of CCMGUIWeb
{
  "command": "NetworkInfo",
  "type": "notify",
  "data": {
    "ID": "xxx",
    "CellularInfo": [{
      "SignalStrength": "...",
      "SignalStrengthUnit": "...",
      "Operator": "...",
      "PLMN": "...",
      "Band": "...",
      "CellID": "...",
      "AirInterface": "...",
      "Manufacture": "...",
      "ModelName": "...",
      "IMEI": "..."
    }],
    "QosInterfaceType": {
      "key1": "val1",
      ...
    }
  }
}
end note

CCMSDK -> CCMSDK: ネットワーク情報変更通知 受信\n(RegistRecieveNetworkInfoHandler)
CCMSDK --> CCMGUIWebSocket: ネットワーク情報変更通知 [notify]
CCMGUIWebSocket --> WebBrowser: 
WebBrowser -> WebBrowser: 1秒間隔で保持データを画面に表示

@enduml
